article.title: Google just gave Sundar Pichai a $692M pay package
article.summary: Most of it is tied to performance, including new stock incentives linked to Waymo and Wing, its drone delivery venture.

all_candidates.title: OpenAI robotics lead Caitlin Kalinowski quits in response to Pentagon deal
all_candidates.summary: Hardware executive Caitlin Kalinowski announced today that in response to OpenAI's controversial agreement with the Department of Defense, she’s resigned from her role leading the company's robotics team.

all_candidates.title: OpenAI delays ChatGPT’s ‘adult mode’ again
all_candidates.summary: The feature, which will give verified adult users access to erotica and other adult content, had already been delayed from December.
